---
title: ""
pagetitle: "CV"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
body-class: page-resume
---

```{=html}
<style>
body.page-resume #title-block-header,
body.page-resume .quarto-title-block,
body.page-resume header.quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }
</style>
<script>document.body.classList.add('page-resume');</script>
{{< include assets/html/cv.html >}}
```
